mapper.insert: INSERT INTO storedetail (storeId, goodsId, num) VALUES (#{storeId}, #{goodsId}, #{num})
mapper.update: UPDATE storedetail SET storeId = #{storeId}, goodsId = #{goodsId}, num = #{num} WHERE sdid = #{sdid}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM storedetail WHERE goodsId = #{goodsId} AND storeId = #{storeId}
mapper.update: UPDATE storedetail SET num = #{num} WHERE goodsId = #{goodsId} AND storeId = #{storeId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM storedetail WHERE goodsId = #{goodsId} AND storeId = #{storeId}
